title: New Views
description: Adds some features from the latest minecraft versions to an older versions
body:
вљ пёЏSome Stuff requies Optifine or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)|[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)|[CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) \
Available features:\
рџђєWolf variants - the coloring for wolves are changes by their biome(Not just random texture). \
рџҐљMob spawn eggs - new look for eggs to easily distinguish them\
рџђ·Pig variants - 2 new pig variants from 25w02a\
рџђ”Chicken variants - 2 new chicken variants from 25w06a\
рџђ®Cow variants - 2 new cow variants from 25w05a\
рџ”ґRedstone torches - new torches from 24w33a. Works also on comparators and repeaters\
рџљ©Banner Patterns - new texture for banner pattern items from snapshot 24w33a\
рџ¦‡Bat - new bat model from version 1.20.2.\
рџ©»Bogged - skeleton, that spawns in swamps from 23w45a. Just replaces texture of skeletons in swamps\
рџ”‰Quiet pistons - quieter piston sounds\
рџЋЁColored bundles - new bundle textures from 24w39a, works while renaming to *color* bundle. in example **black bundle** or **light blue bundle**\
рџЄЅVex - new vex model from version 1.19.3
